studyName: NHLBI Jackson Heart Study Candidate Gene Association Resource (CARe)

tables.description: Subject ID, race, sex, age, participant medical history of coronary artery bypass, heart failure, and myocardial infarction, EKG, spirometry, cholesterol, triglycerides, blood pressure, laboratory tests, T2D, Wolff-Parkinson-White Pattern, height, weight, BMI, intimal medial thickness, menarche, coronary artery, smoking status, and medication of participants involved in the "NHLBI Jackson Heart Study Candidate Gene Association Resource (CARe)" project.

variables.name: LPa
variables.description: Lp(a) measurement at designated visit (may not be from first visit).

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Participant ID

variables.name: age_at_2nd_blood_count
variables.description: Age in years at secondary blood count measurements (MCV, RBC, Neutrophils, Monocytes, Lymphocytes, Eosinophils, Basophils)

variables.name: age_at_LPa
variables.description: Age in years at Lp(a) measurement

variables.name: age_at_cac
variables.description: Age in years at CAC Agatston score measurement

variables.name: age_at_crp
variables.description: Age in years at CRP measurement

variables.name: age_at_ekg
variables.description: Age in years at EKG visit

variables.name: age_at_fasting_glucose
variables.description: Age in years of blood fasting glucose measurement in mg/dL

variables.name: age_at_fasting_insulin
variables.description: Age in years of blood fasting insulin measurement in uU/mL

variables.name: age_at_hematocrit
variables.description: Age in years at hematocrit measurement

variables.name: age_at_hemoglobin
variables.description: Age in years at hemoglobin measurement

variables.name: age_at_imt
variables.description: Age in years at intima media thickness (IMT) measurement

variables.name: age_at_mcv
variables.description: Age in years at mean corpuscular volume measurement

variables.name: age_at_menarche
variables.description: Age in years at menarche (start of menstruation)

variables.name: age_at_platelet_count
variables.description: Age in years at platelet count measurement

variables.name: age_at_rbc
variables.description: Age in years at red blood cell count measurement

variables.name: age_at_wbc
variables.description: Age in years at WBC measurement

variables.name: age_baseline
variables.description: Age in years at first participant visit

variables.name: age_lung_function
variables.description: Age in years at lung function (FEV1 and FVC) measurements

variables.name: avblock2_at_ekg
variables.description: Indicator (0/1) for second degree AV block at EKG visit

variables.name: avblock3_at_ekg
variables.description: Indicator (0/1) for third degree AV block at EKG visit

variables.name: basophils
variables.description: Basophils in absolute numbers at designated visit (may not be from first visit)

variables.name: bmi_baseline
variables.description: Baseline body mass index (BMI) in kg/m2

variables.name: cabg_baseline
variables.description: History of coronary artery bypass (CABG) at first visit (0/1)

variables.name: cac_agatston_score
variables.description: Coronary artery calcium Agatston total score, phantom adjusted

variables.name: chf_baseline
variables.description: History of congestive heart failure (CHF) at first participant visit

variables.name: crp
variables.description: C-reactive protein level in mg/L at designated visit (may not be from first visit)

variables.name: current_smoker_baseline
variables.description: Current smoking status at first participant visit (0/1)

variables.name: dbp_baseline
variables.description: Diastolic blood pressure (DBP) at first participant visit (avg. of 2 measurements), in mm Hg

variables.name: ekg_hr
variables.description: HR interval from EKG at designated visit (may not be from first visit)

variables.name: ekg_pr
variables.description: PR interval from EKG at designated visit (may not be from first visit)

variables.name: ekg_qrs
variables.description: QRS interval from EKG at designated visit (may not be from first visit)

variables.name: ekg_qt
variables.description: QT interval from EKG at designated visit (may not be from first visit)

variables.name: eosinophils
variables.description: Eosinophils in absolute numbers at designated visit (may not be from first visit)

variables.name: fasting_glucose
variables.description: Blood fasting glucose at first participant visit in mg/dL

variables.name: fasting_insulin
variables.description: Blood fasting insulin at first participant visit in uU/mL.  (Note that there are some extreme outliers)

variables.name: fev1_first_avail_visit
variables.description: Forced expiratory volume (FEV1) measurement at the first available visit

variables.name: former_smoker_baseline
variables.description: Former smoking status at first participant visit (0/1)

variables.name: fvc_first_avail_visit
variables.description: Forced vital capacity (FVC) measurement at the first available visit

variables.name: hdl_baseline
variables.description: High density lipoprotein (HDL) cholesterol level in mg/dL at first participant visit

variables.name: height_baseline
variables.description: Standing height in centimeters at first participant visit

variables.name: hematocrit
variables.description: Hematocrit at designated visit (may not be from first visit) in %

variables.name: hemoglobin
variables.description: Hemoglobin at designated visit (may not be from first visit) in g/dl

variables.name: htn_med_baseline
variables.description: Hypertension med status (any) at first participant visit (0/1)

variables.name: htn_status_baseline
variables.description: Hypertension status at first participant visit (0/1)

variables.name: imt_meanmean_farwall_cca
variables.description: Average far wall thickness of the right and left common carotid mean intima media thickness (IMT) values, using as many views as are available for a given study

variables.name: imt_meanmean_farwall_ica
variables.description: Average far wall thickness of the right and left internal carotid maximum intima media thickness IMT values, using as many views as are available for a given study

variables.name: ldl_baseline
variables.description: Baseline calculated low density lipoprotein (LDL) cholesterol in mg/dL (missing where trigs>400)

variables.name: lipid_med_baseline
variables.description: Any lipid lowering medication (statin or other) at first participant visit

variables.name: lymphocytes
variables.description: Lymphocytes in absolute numbers at designated visit (may not be from first visit)

variables.name: mean_corpuscular_volume
variables.description: Mean corpuscular volume in femtoliters at designated visit (may not be from first visit)

variables.name: mi_baseline
variables.description: History of myocardial infarction (MI) recorded at first participant visit (0/1).

variables.name: monocytes
variables.description: Monocytes in absolute numbers at designated visit (may not be from first visit)

variables.name: neutrophils
variables.description: Neutrophils in absolute numbers at designated visit (may not be from first visit)

variables.name: platelet_count
variables.description: Platelet count at designated visit (may not be from first visit) in x 1,000/cubic mm

variables.name: race_selfreport
variables.description: Self report race

variables.name: red_blood_count
variables.description: Red blood cell count (RBC) in million cells per microliter at designated visit (may not be from first visit)

variables.name: sbp_baseline
variables.description: Systolic blood pressure (SBP) at first participant visit (avg. of 2 measurements), in mm Hg

variables.name: sex_selfreport
variables.description: Sex

variables.name: stroke_baseline
variables.description: History of stroke at first participant visit (0/1)

variables.name: t2diabetes_baseline
variables.description: Type 2 diabetes (T2D) status at first participant visit (0/1)

variables.name: totchol_baseline
variables.description: Total cholesterol level at first participant visit in mg/dL

variables.name: trigs_baseline
variables.description: Triglyceride level at first participant visit in mg/dL

variables.name: waist_baseline
variables.description: Waist in centimeters at first participant visit

variables.name: wbc
variables.description: White blood count in x1,000/cubic mm at designated visit (may not be from first visit)

variables.name: weight_baseline
variables.description: Weight in kilograms at first participant visit

variables.name: wpw_at_ekg
variables.description: Indicator (0/1) for Wolff-Parkinson-White pattern at EKG visit

tables.description: Sample ID, tumor status of sample, body site where sample was obtained, histological type of sample, and analyte type of samples obtained from participants involved in the "NHLBI Jackson Heart Study Candidate Gene Association Resource (CARe)" project.

variables.name: ANALYTE_TYPE
variables.description: Analyte Type

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: Body site where sample was collected

variables.name: HISTOLOGICAL_TYPE
variables.description: Cell or tissue type or subtype of sample

variables.name: IS_TUMOR
variables.description: Tumor status

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: De-identified Sample ID
